sub_mechanisms: M_1: form question-type space = set of consistent yes/no answer combinations over a parameter set of related queries
M_2: enumerate model-realized types via temperature sampling (collect k answers per query, identify which combinations the model realizes)
M_3: compute saturation-gap = (model-realized types) \\ (ground-truth-consistent types), where \\ is set difference
M_4: score model by the cardinality and structure of the gap
stripped_llm_application: Evaluation diagnostic that measures the set difference between LLM-realized answer-combination types and ground-truth-consistent answer-combination types over a parameter set of queries.
stripping_rule_applied: removed: saturated, type-space, Stone, Lowenheim-Skolem, omitting-types, model-theoretic (kept 'type' as generic vocabulary)
